ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "purchase_id" TEXT /* ID of the purchase associated with the ticket */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the ticket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the ticket */,
  "assigned_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent to whom the ticket is assigned */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who created the ticket */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., Re-open, On-Hold, Closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the ticket (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions that can be taken on the ticket (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ticket (e.g., technical issues, billing inquiries) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the ticket */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the ticket */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was resolved */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Customer's satisfaction rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "satisfaction_comment" TEXT /* Customer's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES ticket_priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_assigned_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, agent, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an agent */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the agent belongs to */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the agent (e.g., Available, Busy) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the agent belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the agent */,
  "working_hours" TEXT /* Working hours of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., Re-open, On-Hold, Closed) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who took the action */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the ticket */,
  "next_status" TEXT /* Next status of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_action_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_by_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., customer comment, agent response) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_comment_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent to whom the ticket is assigned */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was assigned */,
  "reassigned_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was reassigned (if applicable) */,
  "assignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for assigning the ticket to the agent */,
  "reassignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reassigning the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_assignments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_assignments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_priorities" (
  "priority_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level (e.g., 1 for High, 2 for Medium, 3 for Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)
